slides.title: Force *progression*
slides.body: Add reps or weight, even a tiny bit.

slides.title: Take a *deload*
slides.body: Back off a week to come back stronger.

slides.title: Change a *variable*
slides.body: A new rep range or exercise can restart growth.

slides.title: Smash the *plateau*.
slides.body: Vibe Health ties your training, food and sleep together.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
